articles.title: Steel Dynamics' aluminium flat-rolled mill achieves full 650,000 t/year capacity; automotive qualifications secured
articles.summary: Steel Dynamics completed and commenced commissioning of its third and final cold mill at its Columbus, Mississippi aluminium flat-rolled facility in July 2026, bringing total annual capacity to 650,000 metric tonnes per year; the company confirmed receipt of automotive aluminium sheet product qualifications, with commercial automotive sales expected to begin before end of 2026.
articles.novelis_angle: Steel Dynamics' full 650,000 t/year flat-rolled mill entering automotive qualification at the same time Novelis is ramping Oswego back to full capacity adds a well-capitalised new US entrant to North American automotive aluminium sheet supply, heightening OEM contract competition in H2 2026.

articles.title: AAI urges duty safeguards and BIS scrap standards as India's aluminium imports rise to 3.48 MTPA
articles.summary: India's Aluminium Association of India urged the Ministry of Finance to impose safeguard import duties and establish BIS quality standards for aluminium scrap imports, citing a rise in total aluminium imports to 3.48 million tonnes per annum that the association says is undercutting domestic producers.
articles.novelis_angle: Safeguard duties on flat-rolled semi-finished imports would support Novelis India's competitive position; BIS scrap quality standards could tighten secondary feedstock availability and raise recycled-content costs for Indian FRP producers including Novelis.

articles.title: Destocking pattern hard to reverse in the short term; aluminium prices consolidate and adjust in the near term
articles.summary: SHFE aluminium rose 0.39% to RMB 23,255 per tonne while LME aluminium eased to USD 3,172 per tonne, with analysts forecasting near-term price consolidation in a USD 3,050–3,250 per tonne range as persistent off-season downstream demand weakness and a continuing destocking cycle offset geopolitical supply-side support.
